Shu Juan exposes that Blossom is not pregnant, and that she wants to cheat Jia Hong's money. Blossom's motives are exposed, and in a fit of anger, she breaks up with Jia Hong. Jia Hong is heartbroken, and he takes his anger out on Shu Juan, as he is unhappy that she has broken them up.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 20
programme.desc: Xi Yue sleeps with Yu Jie after getting drunk. Feeling regretful, she quickly goes back home. Yan Xun apologises to Xi Yue that he is unable to celebrate their wedding anniversary. He gives her a gift, and informs her that he will be going overseas to work. Xi Yue becomes emotional. Yan Xun finds out that Xi Yue has an affair, and is taken aback by the news. Xi Yue is unable to face Yan Xun, so she leaves the house. Yan Xun confronts Yu Jie aggressively, and demands Yu Jie to leave the house.

programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 13

Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

programme.title: Masuk Ke Hatiku Pelan Pelan Aja Neng Bajaj
programme.desc: Sherin, who was angry with her sister and her father, finally chose to leave home. There, Sharin worked as a mechanic at a bajaj repair shop. Sherin had fallen in love with a handsome bajaj driver, who had a younger sibling in elementary school who had once been hit by Sherin.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 166
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Pesona Cowok Starboy Adalah Maut
programme.desc: What started as a fake romance turns into real feelings for Kevin (Kevin Hillers) and Indah. His ex, Liyan (Elina Joerg), refuses to accept the breakup and conspires with Andre (Rexy Rizky) to sabotage their relationship and make Indah hate Kevin.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 620
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. Their bond deepens when Nadia chooses Boni's village as the subject for her university thesis.

However, Yogi’s admiration turns to heartbreak when he discovers Wina has given her heart to someone else.

programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mba Mba, Bagi Tutornya Dong Suhu
programme.desc: Upon arriving in Jakarta, Tisa (Adzwa Aurell) is falsely accused of being a pickpocket by Dul (Cakrawala Airawan). Later, Tisa rescues Maya from thugs, and as a thank-you, Maya invites her to stay over. The next morning, Tisa is shocked to find that the grumpy Dul is actually Maya’s older brother.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 621
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 115
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Tuhan Ijinkan Aku Berjodoh Sama Cowok Lele
programme.desc: Indri (Chantiq Schagerl) dreams of winning a roller-skating competition, but her path takes a detour when she meets Jojo (Christ Laurent), a catfish farmer. Jojo is haunted by a past breakup, and Indri find herself entangled in a mission to help him find his true love once again.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 167
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Pesona Cowok Starboy Adalah Maut
programme.desc: What started as a fake romance turns into real feelings for Kevin (Kevin Hillers) and Indah. His ex, Liyan (Elina Joerg), refuses to accept the breakup and conspires with Andre (Rexy Rizky) to sabotage their relationship and make Indah hate Kevin.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 621
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: TENGKULAK KECE IDAMAN
programme.desc: Nadia (Debi Sagita) is rescued from thugs by Boni (Ridwan Ghani), though all of his medicines are destroyed in the scuffle. Impressed by his selfless care for the villagers, Nadia mistakenly believes Boni is a doctor. Touched by his kindness, she gifts him her late brother's unused car. Their bond deepens when Nadia chooses Boni's village as the subject for her university thesis.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 116
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: SURAT KALENG UNTUK MANTAN
programme.desc: Dito (Ridho Ilahi) and Dewi (Masayu Clara) fall in love, but their parents are at war: Dewi sells mung bean porridge while Dito sells chicken porridge. Their families want to marry them off to wealthy suitors, but the couple chooses to fight for their love, documenting their dreams and romance in letters hidden inside a tin can.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 168
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Neng Ayam Sederhana Tapi Bikin Warga Nyaman
programme.desc: After his acting contract is terminated due to a scandal with a co-star, Fadi (Indra Evans) retreats to his mother’s village for a break. There, he meets Naura (Rachquel Nesia), a legendary 'poultry queen' who runs the most successful chicken and egg business in town.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 622

programme.title: Sejuta Rasa Buat Adelia - EP 12

programme.title: Kampung Boy S1 - EP 8

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 36

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 37

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 38

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 39

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 20

programme.desc: Shivaji and his family are uprooted from their community in Sri Lanka and wind up as bonded labourers in Visakhapatnam. The situation worsens when his jealous stepbrother enters his life. Release Year: 2023 Director: V. V. Vinayak

programme.desc: A slacker must impress a wealthy man to marry her daughter. Release Year: 1997 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Veere Di Wedding

Release Year: 2018 Director: Shashanka Ghosh Awards: 2019 Winner Bollywood BusineSS Award- Highest-GroSSing ActreSS- Sonam Kapoor

programme.desc: Manmohan, a businessman with a simple wife, and Narayan, jobless with an ultra-modern wife, try to impress each other's spouses, leading to a chain of hilarious mishaps. Release Year: 2026 Director: Shashank Bali

programme.title: The Hero - Love Story of a Spy
programme.desc: Arun is an Indian undercover agent enlisted to stop ISI chief Ishaq Khan. The village girl Reshma helps him but endangers her own life. Release Year: 2003 Director: Anil Sharma

programme.title: Krrish 3
programme.desc: Krrish and his father must defeat human-animal mutants created by an evil genius, Kaal, who is hell-bent on destroying the world. His vile army is led by a chameleon mutant, Kaya. programme.title: Thirumangalyam - EP 127
programme.desc: Title: Mahasangamam The story of Lakshmi, an innocent orphan raised by her grandmother. Unexpectedly married into a wealthy family, she discovers her husband Nanthan loves his cousin Dhivya. Choosing not to stand in his way, Lakshmi walks away, torn between her dreams and harsh reality. A heartfelt love triangle woven with deep family drama.

programme.title: Geopolitis
programme.desc: Analysis, explanations, neutrality... ''Geopolitis'' offers an unbiased in-depth look at international current affairs, with accuracy, precision and a constant desire to make an increasingly complex and conflictual world easier to understand.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Sur Le Front - EP 8
programme.desc: How is French steel made? Hugo Clement investigates the heart of the heavy industry and reveals its little secrets. An opportunity to discover that a quarter of the greenhouse gas emissions from the French industry is linked to steel production and that this metal is recycled abroad.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Savourer - EP 20
programme.desc: On the menu: Mexican salsa, harissa grilled pepper soup, maple-glazed salmon, mie goreng.

programme.title: Chateau ! - EP 67
programme.desc: The Chateau de la Motte, in Chateaurenard, once run by Marguerite de Maleissye, has stood the test of time. After serving as a hospital during the war, it is now privately owned but open to visitors, and features a secret room full of history.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: La Grande Galerie Francophone - EP 27
programme.desc: Every week and in public, Ali Baddou and his group of columnists receive French-speaking artists who are at the heart of current events and move the lines. Space for exchanges, creations and surprises, ''La Grande Galerie Francophone'' celebrates art in all its diversity and shares it with everyone.

programme.title: Littoral
programme.desc: Littoral, a program meant for those who love the sea, takes you on a trip along Atlantic coastlines, wherever unexpected discoveries, impromptu encounters and intense emotions lead them.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Interieurs - EP 12
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde immerses herself in the rural Norman atmospheres before exploring the Parisian suburbs in search of tastefully renovated houses.

programme.title: Sur Le Front - EP 8
programme.desc: How is French steel made? Hugo Clement investigates the heart of the heavy industry and reveals its little secrets. An opportunity to discover that a quarter of the greenhouse gas emissions from the French industry is linked to steel production and that this metal is recycled abroad.

programme.title: 6h Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Chef Pays - EP 27
programme.desc: Chef Leila Albert prepares chocolate and hazelnut cookies.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Interieurs - EP 12
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde immerses herself in the rural Norman atmospheres before exploring the Parisian suburbs in search of tastefully renovated houses.

programme.title: Littoral
programme.desc: Littoral, a program meant for those who love the sea, takes you on a trip along Atlantic coastlines, wherever unexpected discoveries, impromptu encounters and intense emotions lead them.

programme.title: L'afrik En Contes - EP 23
programme.desc: Why has the fly become an insect that everyone detests, so much so that humans have even created a fly whisk to fight it?

programme.title: La Petite Pokou - EP 12
programme.desc: The priestess from Bali teaches Pokou about the Komians and their role. Shortly afterwards, Pokou turns around and the ground gives way beneath her feet. She finds herself somewhere dark and strange.

programme.title: Il Etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'objets - EP 25
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: L'imagier Anime De Koumi - EP 3
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique - EP 3
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Au Bout De L'enquete, La Fin Du Crime Parfait ? - EP 32
programme.desc: August 1988. Delphine, 9 years old, leaves with her brother for a scout camp near Deauville. Holidays that will quickly turn into a nightmare. One night, while she was supposed to be sleeping peacefully in her tent, Delphine disappeared. Her lifeless body would be found a few days later.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Meurtres A Pont-Aven
programme.desc: The bodies of two gallery-owners have been found. Murders that seem to echo the disappearance of an artist twenty years earlier. And it is his daughter, Marion, who heads the case, alongside Antoine. What links the murders? Suspicions begin to grow about the way the first case was handled.

programme.title: Foot! (1/2)
programme.desc: Match summaries, commentary and analyses, after each day of the Ligue 1 McDonald's, the French football championship.

programme.title: Foot! (2/2)
programme.desc: Match summaries, commentary and analyses, after each day of the Ligue 1 McDonald's, the French football championship.

programme.title: Le Chant Du Fleuve
programme.desc: Poetic and patrimonial walk along the Loire. This dreamlike escapade, depicted as a love story between the river and the literature it has inspired, highlights the changing beauty of the Loire shores to the rhythm of the seasons.

programme.title: Movie - Sakalakala Vallavan
programme.desc: Shakti falls in love with Anjali, but soon realises that she is his bitter rival Chinnasamy's cousin. In a bid to separate them, his family forces him to marry Divya.

programme.title: Movie - Biriyani
programme.desc: Sugan and Parasuram leave Varadharajan's party drunk in search of a place to have biryani. They get into some serious trouble when they find his dead body in the trunk of their car.

programme.title: Movie - Kondaan Koduthaan
programme.desc: A large extended family has been carrying out an age-old tradition of marrying within the family. However, the familial bonds begin to disintegrate when the youngsters do not wish to comply.

programme.title: Movie - Thayamma
programme.desc: Pandiyan, Anand and Babu are friends who live in the same apartment. One day, they are shocked to find a child at their doorstep as it does not belong to any of them.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Moive - Agent Kannayiram
programme.desc: When a rookie yet brilliant detective solving small-time crimes yearns for complicated cases, he chances upon a heart-wrenching case of a grieving father. But as he starts joining the dots, he unravels something more sinister.

programme.title: Movie - Paapanasam
programme.desc: Suyambulingam, a school drop-out but an intelligent man, acquires knowledge by watching movies. When a dark incident seems to ruin his family, he uses all his wits to protect them.

programme.title: Movie - Anniyan
programme.desc: Ramanujam, who suffers from multiple personality disorder, works as a lawyer by day and a vigilante at night. He uses tips from the 'Garuda Purana' as his tools to expose various antisocial elements.

programme.title: Movie - Dheena
programme.desc: Dheena works for his brother Adhikesavan, a gangster, and is very close to him. However, things turn sour between them after a misunderstanding leads to the death of their sister.

programme.title: Movie - Ponniyin Selvan 1
programme.desc: Sensing an uprising in the capital, Crown Prince Aditha Karikalan sends his friend Vallavaraiyan Vandiyadevan on a mission that sets off a series of conspiracies against the reigning king.

programme.title: Movie - Udhayam NH4
programme.desc: Prabhu, a young college student, kidnaps his lover Rithika when her father disapproves of their relationship. Manoj Menon, an encounter specialist, is appointed to track them down.

programme.title: Movie - Kaadhalagi
programme.desc: Nandhini and Thyagu, two childhood friends from different castes, fall in love with each other. However, when Raja discovers their relationship and kills her, her friends set out to seek justice.

programme.title: Movie - Mythili
programme.desc: Deepu dreams of becoming famous by making a musical album, and strange things begin to happen when they film a music video in a haunted house.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Sundara Purushan
programme.desc: A young man returns home years after he ran away. He tries to win over his childhood love, but she is in love with someone else. His brother implicates the girl's lover in a murder and sends him to jail.

programme.title: Movie - Inga Enna Solludhu
programme.desc: A man is forced into an unwanted marriage in order to become rich quickly with his wife's money. However, his foolishness and misfortune push his wife to attempt suicide.

programme.title: Movie - Thadaiyara Thaaka
programme.desc: A young man dreams of making a fortune in Chennai; he owns a travel agency and is all set to marry his lover. After he crosses paths with a loan shark, the latter is killed mysteriously. The young man runs for cover and plans to find the murderer.

programme.title: Movie - Kungumapottu Gounder
programme.desc: Kandasamy is desperate to enroll his son in a good school. Problems arise when his wife spots him with an educated woman who is posing as their child's mother in order to help the kid get admission.

programme.title: Movie - Engal Anna
programme.desc: Prabhakar and Bhavani are deeply in love with each other. However, lovers turn enemies when Prabhakar's father is falsely accused of killing Bhavani's father.

programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026 Day 2 Session 2 Tie 3: China vs Denmark (C1) (Live)
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 37
programme.desc: Diego Gomez's path to the Premier League has been shaped across continents. Beginning his career in Paraguay, the midfielder earned a move to Inter Miami, where he developed his game alongside some of football's biggest names such as Lionel Messi. In 2025, Gomez made the switch to Brighton and the Premier League. Now on the South Coast, Gomez is establishing himself as an important part of the Seagulls' team.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 9
programme.desc: In a career spanning nearly two decades, Gary Cahill claimed every prize available in his illustrious career. Two Premier League titles, two FA Cups, a Champions League winner and many more - the Derbyshire born Centre Back left an indelible mark on the English game. This week, Cahill sits down on the PL Moments sofa to reflect on his journey and talk us though his top 10 Premier League career moments.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 30
programme.desc: Three decades on from Manchester United's iconic Class of '92, PL Stories steps beyond the headline names to rediscover the teammates who shared the same dressing room, dreams, and demands of one of football's most revered youth systems. We sit down with the lesser-known graduates who lived that journey first-hand, players whose paths diverged from the global spotlight but whose experiences offer a rare and revealing window into the reality behind the legend.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 3
programme.desc: With 481 Premier League appearances and five titles - Michael Carrick is a Premier League icon. Carrick sits down with Premier League Moments to look back over his glittering career - from the West Ham youth academy through to being a key figure in Sir Alex's Ferguson's Manchester United side. In addition to his Premier League career, he also reflects on winning the Champions League, Europa League, the FA Cup as well as his international career.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 36
programme.desc: In the heart of Ecuador, we sit down with Antonio Valencia as he reflects on an extraordinary journey from humble beginnings to the grand stages of world football. Against the backdrop of the streets and stadiums that shaped him, he recounts his rise through adversity, his explosive emergence in the Premier League with Wigan, and his evolution into a title-winning, Champions League-chasing leader at Manchester United.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 27
programme.desc: We sit down for an exclusive interview with the second of two new Premier League Hall of fame inductees, Gary Neville. From his journey from Class of '92 prodigy to Premier League Hall of Fame icon, he talks us through the moments that defined his legacy at Manchester United. A story on one of the league's most influential right-backs and a leader whose impact still shapes English football today.

We sit down with the lesser-known graduates who lived that journey first-hand, players whose paths diverged from the global spotlight but whose experiences offer a rare and revealing window into the reality behind the legend.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 27
programme.desc: We sit down for an exclusive interview with the second of two new Premier League Hall of fame inductees, Gary Neville. From his journey from Class of '92 prodigy to Premier League Hall of Fame icon, he talks us through the moments that defined his legacy at Manchester United. A story on one of the league's most influential right-backs and a leader whose impact still shapes English football today.

programme.title: FANZONE - MON 27 APR (Live)
programme.desc: This is the show that puts international fans at the heart of the Premier League conversation. We connect with fans from around the world as they share their views on their teams and favourite players.

programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: THE SATURDAY WRAP - SAT 25 APR
programme.desc: A complete review of all the day's Premier League football, with highlights and studio discussion. The Saturday Wrap broadcasts immediately after Premier League Live on Saturday.

programme.title: The Big Interview 2025/26 - EP 37
programme.desc: Diego Gomez's path to the Premier League has been shaped across continents. Beginning his career in Paraguay, the midfielder earned a move to Inter Miami, where he developed his game alongside some of football's biggest names such as Lionel Messi. In 2025, Gomez made the switch to Brighton and the Premier League. Now on the South Coast, Gomez is establishing himself as an important part of the Seagulls' team.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Newcastle United (MW34) (Live) - EP 339
programme.desc: Following their 2-1 win at St James’ Park in September, Arsenal are looking to complete the league double over Newcastle for the first time since 2020-21.

programme.title: PL Stories 2025/26 - EP 47
programme.desc: We celebrate the rise of Norwegian striking power in the Premier League, exploring how a golden generation in the late 1990s; featuring pioneers like Ole Gunnar Solskjær and Tore André Flo helped shatter stereotypes and establish Norway as an unlikely breeding ground for elite forwards.

programme.title: PL Moments 2025/26 - EP 9
programme.desc: In a career spanning nearly two decades, Gary Cahill claimed every prize available in his illustrious career. Two Premier League titles, two FA Cups, a Champions League winner and many more - the Derbyshire born Centre Back left an indelible mark on the English game. This week, Cahill sits down on the PL Moments sofa to reflect on his journey and talk us though his top 10 Premier League career moments.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Everton (MW34) - EP 337
programme.desc: Everton have won more Premier League games against West Ham both overall (29) and away from home (13) than they have vs any other opponent in the competition.

programme.desc: Having lost just two of their first 13 Premier League home games against Aston Villa (W5 D6), Fulham have now lost three of their last four against them at Craven Cottage (W1).

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Nkazimulo Zulu vs. Jake Hadley
programme.desc: This episode features a flyweight championship bout as Jake Hadley takes on the veteran Nkazimulo Zulu. Bonus coverage includes Mutuale Basambombo vs. HP Van Staden and Christian Bobo vs. Adrian Sanchez.

programme.title: WCCB Uisma Lima vs. Shervantaigh Koopman
programme.desc: The IBO Super Welterweight World Championship is on the line when champion Uisma Lima of Portugal defends against undefeated Shervantaigh Koopman at the Emperors Palace in Kempton Park, South Africa. Lima claimed the title with a unanimous decision victory over Sukhdeep Singh Bhatti in December, and will be looking to make his first successful defense against the IBO Intercontinental titleholder, Koopman.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 9: Netanya, Israel - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Krav Maga with Masters Ran Nakash and Avivit Oftek Cohen.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Gennady Golovkin vs. Grzegorz Proksa
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the American debut of future unified middleweight world champion Gennady Golovkin, who takes on Grzegorz Proska. Also on the card, action from kickboxing star Nieky Holzken.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 featuring Abi, Hakuho, Takakeisho and Asanoyama from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Luis Maysonet
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector "Macho" Camacho (48-3 22 KO 150 lbs) looks to continue his winning streak against Luis Maysonet (28-5 28 KO) in a 10-round contest from Foxwoods Resort Mashantucket CT USA.

programme.desc: This episode features a flyweight championship bout as Jake Hadley takes on the veteran Nkazimulo Zulu. Bonus coverage includes Mutuale Basambombo vs. HP Van Staden and Christian Bobo vs. Adrian Sanchez.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams II
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a WBC middleweight title bout between Sergio 'Maravilla' Martinez (45-2, 24 KOs) and Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (39-1, 27 KOs) from Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on November 20, 2010.

programme.title: World Karate Federation
programme.desc: The highest level of competition in the sport of karate anywhere in the world will take place from Budapest, Hungary, as the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS take place. The top competitors from across the globe, from six different continents, will all converge on Budapest to stake their claim as the best in the world. Don't miss the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS, only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Gerry Penalosa vs. Jhonny Gonzalez
programme.desc: This episode features Jhonny Gonzalez defending his WBO bantamweight title against Gerry Penalosa, as well as kickboxing, sumo, weapons and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Arturo Gatti vs. Alfonso Gomez
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Arturo Gatti facing off with Alfonso Gomez in what would be Gatti's final boxing match. Also on the card, Andre Berto takes on veteran Carlos Quintana on his way to stardom.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Takakeisho, Tokushoryu, Kagayaki and Enho.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Yuriorkis Gamboa vs. Marcos Ramirez
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undefeated featherweights Yuriorkis Gamboa, 'El Cinclon de Guantanamo', (11-0, 9 KOs) and Marcos Ramirez (25-0, 16 KOs) from the Pechanga Resort and Casino in Temecula, California, USA, on October 4, 2008. The two young fighters had a quick ending street brawl that brought the crowd to its feet.

programme.title: WCCB David Benavidez vs. David Morrell
programme.desc: From the T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas, interim WBC Light Heavyweight Champion David Benavidez meets WBA 'Regular' champion David Morrell.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Floyd Mayweather, Jr.
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a heavily-anticipated welterweight bout featuring Floyd Mayweather, Jr. and "Sugar" Shane Mosley. The fight, which generated $78 million in revenue, was Mayweather's first title fight since his comeback from his first retirement. Also on the card, heavyweight Bermane Stiverne and two-weight world champ Marcos Maidana.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo

This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 2, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Shohozan, Yutakayama, Endo and Okinoumi

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Zagreb Grand Prix, where some of the young Judo fans get the opportunity to train with former Olympic champion Mark Huizinga and triple world champion Illias Iliadis. Plus we watch as Judo's biggest star Teddy Riner competes in the +100 kg division.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode is highlighted by a heartfelt interview with the legendary MMA Hall of Famer Tito Ortiz that shows you sides of the former champ you never knew from his childhood to his love of fishing to the man he is today. We stop by "Cowboy" Donald Cerrone's ranch to see you don't need the flashiest training equipment to be a world class fighter. Plus Nate Marquardt gets his dream car and UFC ring girls bring us on a tour of a new gym.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 7
programme.desc: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister, and the Squirrels have questions.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 9
programme.desc: The Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind a cupboard... it's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 21
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 22
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 23
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 93
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po are outside in the cold when they spot the Tiddlytubbies who are warm, inside. The Teletubbies put on hats, gloves and scarves to keep warm.

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! (S1) - EP 7

programme.title: Pop Paper City (S1) - EP 37

programme.desc: Dog loves books, and Dog especially loves books with fairytales in them. But this particular book of fairytales has an unlucky imp inside it.

programme.desc: Messy has to save OKIDO from a falling comet before his bedtime! He sees that Mayor Oki still has his bath!

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S4) - EP 5
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'chicken' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of chickens - a brown chicken, a white chicken, a clucking chicken and some friendly chickens.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 15
programme.desc: Everyone in OKIDO is feeling very tired. Messy tries to help by adding extra superbeans to Farmer Fuddle's new recipe, but now everyone has far too much energy! How can Messy help them burn it off?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo only wanted to help fix a satellite dish with Mojo's chopper top. Now they've been mistaken for a UFO, and the whole town is in a tizzy about invading aliens!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 2
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 1
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 27
programme.desc: After a rainbow appears over the Go Jet Academy, Glitch becomes fascinated with the legend of a pot of gold appearing at the end of it.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 47
programme.desc: Bluey needs her Mum's advice on dealing with a troublesome neighbour, when the serenity of her couch cushion playhouse is threatened by Bingo's own growing stable of animals.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 50
programme.desc: Grandad is supposed to be resting, but when Bluey and Bingo go to visit him, he makes a run for it with the kids and takes them on a madcap adventure into the bush.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 14
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 15
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Globetrotting Andy, Jen and Scout are on a new mission in their Eco-Explorer: to discover more about incredible animal families and their babies.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Bella and Lift are visited by a shining star and set off to explore the floors of Playtime Towers. The first stop is Sketch in Boxtropolis - what will she be making today?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 23
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels help to put on an amateur dramatic show.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 22
programme.desc: There has been a power cut and the squirrels use their torches to make shadows.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning his biscuit tin collection, one of the many things he collects. The squirrels are inspired to make their own collections.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 33
programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots are on holiday in Egypt where the Grimbots bury the Great Sphinx in sand, leaving only its head showing.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 32
programme.desc: The Go Jetters save the Florida Everglades when hungry alligators chase Glitch's picnic.

programme.desc: Max and Monty's antics on a construction site get them into trouble.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 22

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 35
programme.desc: Stanley helps Seamus and Little Woo reconstruct the Big Wheel from Seamus' childhood. This is more difficult than Stanley thought it would be as it needs a clean and an upgrade.

programme.desc: Little Woo would like Stanley to help them find more noisy things in the museum. They go through the museum and pick out some things for a new exhibition.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals (S1) - EP 19

programme.desc: It is pranks day. The Barbababies have fun finding new pranks... until Barbabright spots the track of a dinosaur.

programme.desc: Everest, the Turbots and a Space Rock get trapped in a cave.

programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to give Grocer Gabriel the best beach day ever... including a ride on a brand new Ferris wheel at the boardwalk! // When Farmer Zoe's animals need some relaxation, the pups build a perfect place to practice yoga with Coach Karima.

programme.desc: Dora's crab friends are getting married but Swiper swipes the ring and loses it in the ocean. Dora has to get the ring back! / Dora and Boots meet Vicky the Vicuna who is missing her magic flute that she needs to go back to the Cloud Kingdom.

programme.title: DORA S2 - EP 206
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take Claudia, an energetic young rain cloud, to rain on a dry water slide. / Boots gets a case of Tickle Tail that Ranita the Frog can cure if she gets her magic stripes by helping friends around the Rainforest.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 118
programme.desc: The barbababies prepare a show for Barbamama's birthday. While Barbalala finishes up, they go to the carnival where Barbabeau gets stuck in an attraction. // Three separate stories telescope into a big final bouquet in the middle of the courtyard.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 120
programme.desc: Barbalib, Barbalala and Barbabelle take turns as narrators to tell a story, each one bringing a very personal touch to it. // The Barbapapa family spends a day at the beach. Divided into 2 teams, the barbababies fight over a sandy peninsula.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 121
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 122
programme.desc: Barbabright acts strangely. What is he hiding ? The Barbabbabies will do anything to find out. // The Barbapapa decide to save energy. But their efforts are undermined by Barbabright and Barbabelle who build a secret energy-consuming project.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 123
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S2 - EP 210
programme.desc: Skye visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay when their construction project needs some aerial support. But when Speed Meister tries to beat the pups to finish the job, Skye, Rubble, and the rest of the crew jump into rescue mode to save the day!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S2 - EP 211
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway asks Rubble & Crew to build something special for her friend Mr. Ducky-Doo. But soon a construction mystery is afoot... // Rubble & Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S1 - EP 117
programme.desc: It's a hot day and the pups head for the water park - but the pool is empty! Paw Patrol to the rescue. // When the animals don't show up in time for the Circus to start; Ryder and the Paw Patrol step in to help.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S1 - EP 119
programme.desc: Rubble is pretending to be a super pup but get's himself in some trouble. Ryder and the Paw Patrol have to save Rubble! // When Ryder's Robot Pup breaks and starts going wild around Adventure Bay, it takes the whole Paw Patrol to help Ryder find it.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S2 - EP 226
programme.desc: Barbapapa tells the Barbababies about his extraordinary encounter with a wolf. // Tomorrow is the Barbababies' first day of school.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 101
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space S2 - EP 202
programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.desc: When Speed Meister's rollercoaster sends a pet playdate out of control, Rubble & Crew save the day with a bigger, better, and safer coaster. // The Bark Yard safety inspection is today! But will Motor go boom and cost the Crew a gold safety star?

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S5 - EP 501
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are racing through the jungle when Blaze gets trapped in super sticky mud! Now it's up to AJ and his new animal friends, to go on an epic adventure to save Blaze!

programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile volunteers to help too many friends with their projects all at the same time. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile invite a new friend, PomPom, to live with them.

programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 113
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S7 - EP 703
programme.desc: It's Grammy's birthday but Crusher doesn't have enough money for a special gift! So, Blaze and AJ help him do different jobs and earn the money for Grammy's present. But, they have to hurry so they can be back in time for Grammy's birthday party!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S7 - EP 704
programme.desc: When Crusher and Pickle are trapped inside a cage over a bubbling slime swap, it's up to Blaze, AJ, and Sparkle to become...Knights! Will they be able to rescue Crusher and Pickle from the swamp before it's too late?

programme.desc: After uncovering dinosaur bones, the pups decide to build a dinosaur museum! // When Omar the Mail Carrier breaks his foot, it's up to the pups to make sure he can still deliver the mail by building ramps all over town.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S8 - EP 802
programme.desc: Encased in a huge chocolate bunny, Humdinger is carried away by hungry raccoons and ends up floating in Adventure Bay with a curious dolphin. // When a magic trick goes awry, the Adventure Bay Easter Festival is overrun by wild bunnies.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S8 - EP 803
programme.desc: Rubble dreams that he's been taken aboard a spaceship and meets his alien double. When the ship crashes on an alien planet, he needs help. // The Pups must save Humdinger and his kittens when they mess around with Toodles the Clown's tiny clown car.

programme.title: DORA S1 - EP 102

programme.desc: When power problems shut down Sierra Sparkle's show, the pups hop in their big vehicles to turn the power back on.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S3 - EP 305
programme.desc: Rubble and the pups help Cafe Carl make enough ice cream for everyone! If Speed Meister doesn't get in the way...

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile S1 - EP 103
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile worries he'll be caught between his old best friend Buzzy and his new best friend Daisy. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile's simple treehouse gets complicated when they try to add space for all their friends.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 126
programme.desc: The Barbababies think their food can make them change colours and shapes. They decide to find the right food for each of them. // Barbabeau lacks inspiration, he can't create anymore. The whole family helps by suggesting new subjects to paint.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: After last season’s victory, Aja and Krel struggle to relocate Mothership back to their Arcadia Oaks neighborhood, but their task is complicated when Toby and Eli discover the Royals’ Akiridion secret.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: Aja and Krel hitch a ride in Stuart’s old UFO on a mission to rescue Vex from a bounty hunter outpost on the Moon. Meanwhile, Zadra receives intel about Morando from a surprising new ally.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S3 - EP 65
programme.desc: After Heather is lured to the Northern Markets as a trap, Hiccup flies to find her, but when he arrives too late, Windshear is captured by Krogan

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S3 - EP 66
programme.desc: Hiccup and his crew are in search for dragon eye gems only to discover a spy amongst them In the midst of it all Dagur has run into an old nemesis

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S3 - EP 67
programme.desc: Hiccup and Stoick set forth to find willow bark while Gobber holds a cookoff for the merchants until things go a riot and the riders have to protect Berk

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: The snails and Tito travel to Tokyo to film a commercial and Turbo is challenged to a drift race against a beautiful and mysterious female cricket.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: In order to investigate one of Skidmark's conspiracy theories, Turbo and Skid join a dangerous underground zip line race/The crew is surprised when Whiplash enters the town's annual Tomato Games. Turbo discovers that Whiplash is really trying to keep an eye on an untrustworthy snail who is Whiplash's former mentor.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: A gang of crooks mistakes Archibald for a criminal mastermind. Archibald unearths a rock with mysterious - and feather-raising - powers.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 17
programme.desc: Pirate Captain says he doesn't want to be the captain anymore. Noddy investigates how they can help him and he soon finds the reason for the Captain's distress: someone took his beard! Noddy sets out in search of the missing beard.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 18
programme.desc: Revs and Tractor are doing Tom's deliveries together, but only Tractor comes back. Why isn't Revs with Tractor? Tractor is too upset to explain what happened, so Noddy investigates to find his friend.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 19
programme.desc: It's the Toyland Circus and all the toys are rehearsing an act - all except Smartysaurus, who rushes away, apparently too shy to take part. Noddy has to find a way to help Smartysaurus find an act for the circus.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 20
programme.desc: Action-hero Deltoid suddenly loses all his strength and finds himself totally helpless. Noddy quickly starts an investigation: How can he help Deltoid get his strength back?

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Hen didn't peck the ground. She was a proud mother who spent all her time looking after and cleaning her chicks. Fancy pancy Peacock upsets Mama Hen and makes her feel plain. All the animals are furious with Snooty Peacock… but the damage has been done. Eagle - Mama Hen's best friend - decides to lend Hen her most prized possession - A needle! And Mama Hen sews herself the most beautiful coat of new feathers. Everyone is delighted and they dance and dance and dance.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Bat didn't hang upside down. He used to fly all over Tinga Tinga, saying ‘Boo!' to all the animals and giving them a fright. Nothing could be more fun for Bat. But one day Bat went too far… and the animals decided to give Bat a dose of his own medicine. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 13
programme.desc: Lauren and Sara lead a camping trip to the Scottish Highlands, but disaster strikes when Ajay and PC Selby are stuck in Pencaster with the tent and cooking equipment. Pat must transport them to the Highlands in the SDS Plane and put up the tent before nightfall in order to accomplish his mission.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 14
programme.desc: It's Knights and Dragons Day at school and Pat has to travel to a Welsh castle to pick up some ancient artefacts and Sarah Gilbertson's Auntie Jackie! Pat is rather partial to a suit of armour - and when he's presented with a real one at the castle, he can't resist trying it on! But the suit gets stuck shut, leaving the excitable children wondering where their artefacts are!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 9
programme.desc: Farmer Green tells the cars about olden days, when the only transport was horse and cart. Maxi and Drifter say they would never be seen travelling that slow… or would they?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 10
programme.desc: FB is excited about his sleepover with the other cars in the workshop but when the night draws in he is unsure of his unfamiliar surroundings. Big Chris helps set him at his ease

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 11
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor has asked CiCi to perform one of her stunts in front of a big crowd. CiCi is very nervous and Roary does his best to help his friend prepare for the event.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 12
programme.desc: Big Chris is feeling ill so Marsha sends him to bed until he is better. Big Chris enjoys the attention rather too much and fails to let everyone know when he is on the mend.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: The Pirate Captain is very worried. Scurvy the parrot isn't saying a word. Without him navigating they won't be able to go treasure hunting anymore! Why is Scurvy so quiet? Is there something wrong? Or is he hiding something? It's up to Noddy to investigate!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: The Ninjas are preparing for an acrobatics show. But after Pat-Pat decorates them with glitter they don't turn up for their rehearsal. Noddy investigates, looking for the Ninjas, but only finds sticky things have gone missing round Toyland - Pat-Pat's glue-stick, the Naughticorns' sticky tape, the Builders' sticky putty. Noddy works out that the glitter made the Ninjas non sticky, so they borrowed sticky things to try and make themselves sticky again. Case closed!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: Pat-Pat is packing for a sleepover at the Palace when her suitcase goes missing. Noddy follows the clues and discovers that the Pockets took the suitcase in order to get Pat-Pat's sleepy pillow. They wanted to keep the pillow because it reminds them of Pat-Pat and they would miss her while she was at the sleepover. Noddy finds the Pockets and the suitcase in the dark, just in time for the sleepover. Queen Sparklewings invites everyone to the sleepover. Well done Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: The Naughticorns are having a party and naturally they want everyone to come. Trouble is, so are the Pirates. But when no one turns up to either party, Noddy investigates: Why has no one come to either party?

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 36
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 37
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: Magnus's nephew, Axel, arrives on the island and tells the Rescue Riders that he wants to join their team. But is he just a trickster like his uncle?

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: When sea-dwelling dragons called Divewings start attacking ships near the island, the Rescue Riders have to find out what's making them so upset.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: When Rodney draws and writes his own comic book, TZG secretly helps him transport it to the comic book store where creator Ken KaBlam is on the hunt for new talent. / When Ken KaBlam gets homesick for his own hometown of Crostonburg, TZG secretly recreates the things me misses in Harmony Harbor.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: When the Dews' Glitter Guide, Willow comes to check on the Dews’ progress, they feel like they’re failing to impress her, until Lola gets locked out of the apartment during a game of Hide-and-Seek and Dews work together to get her back inside. / When the Dew Drops discover a time capsule in the park, they set out to find the mystery owner.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: The Pirate Captain is very worried. Scurvy the parrot isn't saying a word. Without him navigating they won't be able to go treasure hunting anymore! Why is Scurvy so quiet? Is there something wrong? Or is he hiding something? It's up to Noddy to investigate!

programme.desc: The Ninjas are preparing for an acrobatics show. But after Pat-Pat decorates them with glitter they don't turn up for their rehearsal. Noddy investigates, looking for the Ninjas, but only finds sticky things have gone missing round Toyland - Pat-Pat's glue-stick, the Naughticorns' sticky tape, the Builders' sticky putty. Noddy works out that the glitter made the Ninjas non sticky, so they borrowed sticky things to try and make themselves sticky again. Case closed!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: Pat-Pat is packing for a sleepover at the Palace when her suitcase goes missing. Noddy follows the clues and discovers that the Pockets took the suitcase in order to get Pat-Pat's sleepy pillow. They wanted to keep the pillow because it reminds them of Pat-Pat and they would miss her while she was at the sleepover. Noddy finds the Pockets and the suitcase in the dark, just in time for the sleepover. Queen Sparklewings invites everyone to the sleepover. Well done Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: The Naughticorns are having a party and naturally they want everyone to come. Trouble is, so are the Pirates. But when no one turns up to either party, Noddy investigates: Why has no one come to either party?

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: George and Harold create a comic book about their gym teacher, but after a freak accident turns fantasy into reality, the best friends must run from his revenge

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: When George and Harold go back in time to stop the invention of homework, they realize they also eliminated the most important thing in the world: comic books

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: When Erica makes fun of George and Harold’s latest and greatest comic, they make a comic about her becoming a vampire

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: George and Harold transform their new Spanish teacher into a superhero after they feel guilty for pranking him, but their teacher loves it and gets carried away

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: After Erica convinces them that being suspended is a great vacation, George and Harold pull off every prank they can think of in order to get suspended

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Dinotrux S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: The Dinotrux find a nest of Tortool eggs. The hatchlings think Dozer is their mother and proceed to wreak havoc, painting everything in sight.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy S3 - EP 73
programme.desc: Big Oil is bringing big improvements to the school. But new track stables, an upgraded veterinary lab and dorm rooms come at a cost - and spark disaster.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: After injecting all the teachers with bee DNA, the Melvins run the new "hivemind" of the school. But Ms. Ribble is accidently injected with too much "Bee- NA" and becomes the queen bee, overpowering the Melvins' control. George, Harold and the recently re-hired Vice Principal Krupp must work with the Melvins and stop her from turning everyone into her Zombees.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: In hopes of raising their grades so they can go to Lake Summer Camp, George and Harold must teach Ratrick, their assigned rat, a simple task. But Ratrick runs away into the sewers where he is doused with toxic waste and transformed into Poopacabra! It's now up to the boys and Captain Underpants to stop the beast before it takes over Piqua with its stench, and more importantly, ruins the boys' chances to go to Lake Summer Camp.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: George and Harold decide to do an extra credit project on dinosaurs to help their chances of getting summer camp-worthy grades. When Melvin brings in a dinosaur frozen in ice, the boys try to get rid of it. But the ice thaws and they meet Diddlysaurus, a prankster raptor who's huge fans of the boys. He offers to help them with their project if he can pull pranks with them, but when the pranks go too far, the boys and Captain Underpants have to deal with the dino.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: Po and team arrive in Guatemala and meet farmers who are facing a mysterious threat-- named The Protector, wielding the Storm Wheels. Elsewhere, Colin the Stag Knight and Weimin team up to go after Po and discover Mr. Ping's connection to the widely feared Pirate Queen.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: Po and team go to the city of Tikal to get more information on the Protector, but it's easier said than done, since nobody in the town actually knows the identity of the Protector. Blade becomes increasingly frustrated and Po attempts to help her.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: Po and team play a game of Pok-ta-pok against a family of armadillos for the opportunity to talk one on one with Zuma, the leader. The game brings out a highly competitive and aggressive side to Blade, known as "The Beast." Back in China, Colin and Weimin find the Pirate Queen and become part of her pirate crew.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 26
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 27
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 28
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: When Bootsy's plan of 6 strategically placed kittens brings the whole town down, Mega Fat is forced to team with Boss Baby

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: When Grandma Templeton comes to stay, she forces Boss Baby into Tim's room but they struggle to be roommates, and meanwhile, Baby Corp's new CEO trusts Boss Baby with the new Stinkless Serum

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: Convinced old people are the new enemy, Boss Baby uses Tim to create havoc at the senior center, but a war soon begins when the seniors rally against babies

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: After injecting all the teachers with bee DNA, the Melvins run the new "hivemind" of the school. But Ms. Ribble is accidently injected with too much "Bee- NA" and becomes the queen bee, overpowering the Melvins' control. It's now up to the boys and Captain Underpants to stop the beast before it takes over Piqua with its stench, and more importantly, ruins the boys' chances to go to Lake Summer Camp.

programme.desc: George and Harold decide to do an extra credit project on dinosaurs to help their chances of getting summer camp-worthy grades. When Melvin brings in a dinosaur frozen in ice, the boys try to get rid of it. But the ice thaws and they meet Diddlysaurus, a prankster raptor who's huge fans of the boys. He offers to help them with their project if he can pull pranks with them, but when the pranks go too far, the boys and Captain Underpants have to deal with the dino.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Tony and his crew have been working as spy racers in LA for a while now and are itching to go international. Whey they discover a mysterious man with a strange tattoo of a formula in a smuggling ring bust, Ms. Nowhere finally agrees to let them go to Rio to investigate the tattoo and the whereabouts of one of her agents who has gone dark - Layla Gray.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere drops the kids off in Brazil and leaves to go on her own important mission, but things immediately go south for Tony and his crew. When the hauler and gear gets caught in quicksand, Tony needs to learn that a good leader knows when to accept help.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: After losing their mission materials in quicksand, Tony decides to channel Dom and Blend in to get intel from the people of Rio. Unfortunately it's more difficult than he expected, and Tony and his crew are picked up by a group of favela gangsters in a neighborhood that worships a mysterious young female martyr. The crew is relieved to find that Layla is in charge of the gangsters - until she orders the gangsters to dispose of them!

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: George and Harold create a comic book about their gym teacher, but after a freak accident turns fantasy into reality, the best friends must run from his revenge

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: When George and Harold go back in time to stop the invention of homework, they realize they also eliminated the most important thing in the world: comic books

programme.desc: When Erica makes fun of George and Harold’s latest and greatest comic, they make a comic about her becoming a vampire
